title: Zapier not showing all column data in Monday
excerpt:
Anyone using Zapier? 
I’m querying Monday from Zapier and not seeing all the columns.   It’s not that the column type is unsupported, I see other columns of the type I’m trying to use.   I turned on Developer Mode in Mon…

posts.author: meddle01 (John Gray)
posts.cookedHtml:
Anyone using Zapier?

I’m querying Monday from Zapier and not seeing all the columns. It’s not that the column type is unsupported, I see other columns of the type I’m trying to use. I turned on Developer Mode in Monday to get the Column ID and tried specifying that but it doesn’t work.

Anyone had this issue?

Thanks

posts.author: therealkenobi (Mark B)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @meddle01 - did you resolve this? I’m having the same issue. The column I’m unable to create is “subtask” - which renders my automation functionally useless because it now requires a manual step.

posts.author: meddle01 (John Gray)
posts.cookedHtml:
No, still struggling with this one.

If I encounter a solution I’ll follow back up on this thread. Can you let me know if you find success on it as well?

Thanks
